project.name: HeyGen Phase 1: Avatar Creator + Personalized Video Outreach

features.name: HeyGen Infrastructure
features.description: Database schema, credential storage, shared API client, webhook handler

features.name: AI Avatar Creator
features.description: One-click avatar setup: photo upload, LORA training, look generation, voice selection

features.name: Personalized Video Outreach
features.description: Template-based personalized video generation integrated with Ops campaigns and Instantly push

stories.title: Database migration: HeyGen credential + avatar storage schema
acceptance: heygen_org_credentials table created (org_id, api_key, plan_tier) with service-role-only RLS
heygen_avatars table created (id, org_id, user_id, heygen_avatar_id, heygen_group_id, avatar_type, status, looks JSONB, voice_id, thumbnail_url)
heygen_videos table created (id, org_id, user_id, heygen_video_id, template_id, status, video_url, thumbnail_url, prospect_data JSONB, campaign_link_id, expires_at)
Indexes on org_id, user_id, status, campaign_link_id
Migration is re-runnable (IF NOT EXISTS, DROP POLICY IF EXISTS)

stories.title: Shared HeyGen API client (_shared/heygen.ts)
acceptance: HeyGenClient class with typed methods: listAvatars(), createPhotoAvatar(), trainAvatar(), getTrainingStatus(), generateLook(), addMotion(), generateVideo(), getVideoStatus(), listVoices()
Auth via x-api-key header, base URL https://api.heygen.com
Typed request/response interfaces for all endpoints
Error handling with typed HeyGenError (status, message, code)
Rate limit awareness (retry-after header respect)

stories.title: HeyGen admin edge function (credential management + avatar listing)
acceptance: POST /heygen-admin with actions: save_credentials, test_credentials, list_voices, get_account_info
save_credentials stores API key in heygen_org_credentials (service role)
test_credentials calls HeyGen /v2/avatars to verify key works
list_voices returns available TTS voices from HeyGen
Auth: JWT validated, org membership + admin role checked (matches hubspot-admin pattern)

stories.title: Avatar creation edge function (photo upload + training pipeline)
acceptance: POST /heygen-avatar-create with actions: generate_photo, upload_photo, create_group, train, check_training_status, generate_look, add_motion
generate_photo: calls /v2/photo_avatar/photo/generate with name, age, gender, ethnicity, orientation, pose, style, appearance
create_group + train: creates avatar group, kicks off LORA training, stores group_id in heygen_avatars
generate_look: creates new looks (professional, casual, branded) after training completes
add_motion: adds motion to final avatar look
All status updates written to heygen_avatars table (status: creating, training, ready, failed)

stories.title: Avatar status polling edge function
acceptance: POST /heygen-avatar-status with avatar_id parameter
Checks training status via /v2/photo_avatar/train/status/{group_id}
Checks generation status via /v2/photo_avatar/generation/{generation_id}
Updates heygen_avatars.status and heygen_avatars.looks JSONB on completion
Returns current status + thumbnail URLs for completed looks

stories.title: Voice listing and selection edge function
acceptance: GET /heygen-voices returns available voices from HeyGen with language, gender, preview_url
Saves selected voice_id to heygen_avatars record
Filters by language and gender for easy UI selection
Caches voice list in-memory (voices don't change often)

stories.title: HeyGen integration settings UI (API key + connection status)
acceptance: New HeyGen card on Integrations settings page (follows Instantly/HubSpot pattern)
API key input with save + test connection button
Connection status indicator (connected/disconnected/error)
Account info display (plan tier, credits remaining) after connection
Uses IntegrationCard component pattern from existing integrations

stories.title: Avatar Creator UI (guided setup wizard)
acceptance: New 'Create Your AI Avatar' page accessible from Settings or onboarding
Step 1: Upload photo OR generate AI photo (gender, ethnicity, age, style selectors)
Step 2: Training progress indicator with polling (auto-advances when LORA training completes)
Step 3: Look generation — preview 3 auto-generated looks (professional, casual, branded) with thumbnails
Step 4: Voice selection — searchable voice list with audio preview, save to heygen_avatars.voice_id
Final state: 'Your avatar is ready!' with preview thumbnail and 'Use in Outreach' CTA

stories.title: Video generation edge function (personalized video from template)
acceptance: POST /heygen-video-generate accepts: avatar_id (from heygen_avatars), script_template, variables (first_name, company, pain_point, etc.), callback_url
Resolves avatar look + voice from heygen_avatars record
Calls POST /v2/video/generate with character (avatar), voice (text input with variable substitution), background
Stores heygen_video_id + status in heygen_videos table
Supports batch mode: accepts array of prospect variables, generates one video per prospect (max 50)

stories.title: Video status webhook + polling edge function
acceptance: POST /heygen-video-webhook receives HeyGen callback with video_id + status
On completed: fetches video URL from GET /v1/video_status.get, stores in heygen_videos.video_url
On failed: updates heygen_videos.status to 'failed' with error message
Fallback polling: GET /heygen-video-status?video_id= for manual status check
Public endpoint (webhook) — validates via callback_id matching

stories.title: Integrate video generation into campaign-outreach-draft
acceptance: campaign-outreach-draft accepts optional include_video: true flag
When include_video=true: generates video script alongside email/LinkedIn copy
Video script is shorter (15-30 sec), conversational, mentions prospect by name
Calls heygen-video-generate internally with the generated script + prospect variables
Returns video_id in response alongside text draft for async video URL resolution

stories.title: Ops table video column + Instantly push integration
acceptance: New integration_type 'heygen_video' for dynamic_table_columns
heygen_video column displays: thumbnail + status badge (pending/generating/ready/failed)
Batch video generation trigger: select rows in Ops table, click 'Generate Videos', kicks off heygen-video-generate for each row
push-to-instantly includes video URL as custom_variable (e.g., {{video_url}}) when heygen_video column has a ready video
Video URLs resolve from heygen_videos table by matching campaign_link_id or row_id

stories.title: OutreachComposer video toggle + preview
acceptance: Toggle in OutreachComposer: 'Include personalized video' (only visible if avatar exists)
When enabled: shows video script preview below email/LinkedIn draft
Video generation status indicator (spinner while generating, thumbnail when ready)
Click thumbnail to preview video in modal
Video URL auto-inserted as [VIDEO_LINK] placeholder in email body

stories.title: Ops table batch video generation UI + status column renderer
acceptance: New column renderer for heygen_video type: shows thumbnail + status badge in cell
Bulk action: select rows -> 'Generate Videos' button in toolbar
Progress indicator: X of Y videos generating, with per-row status updates
Click cell to expand video preview + copy video URL
Column auto-created when 'Generate Videos' action is first used on a table
